evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour dominates: emphasis on credit risk, recovery strategy, meticulous analysis, and governance with no velocity signals.

evidence.domain_risk_explanation: High: financial services managing customer credit and debt—core risk domain with regulatory/compliance dimensions.

evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Finance; recouvrement; crédit; risque crédit; reporting to COMEX
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Finance-oriented: focus on financial reporting, credit risk, recovery strategy, and executive reporting.

evidence.ai_role_explanation: Knowledge of ML/AI mentioned as 'plus' but not expected; no AI-specific candidate skill mentioned.

evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High: fear of credit losses, regulatory provisioning requirements, and risk management dominate the role framing.
